center.name: 惠普斯奈德动物园
center.summary: 惠普斯奈德动物园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括西牛背鹭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Numerous birds were also released by Whipsnade Zoo in England, but the species was never established. Although the cattle egret sometimes feeds in shallow water, unlike most herons it is typically found in fields and dry grassy habitats, reflecting its greater dietary reliance on terrestrial insects rather than aquatic prey
